overall.description: A first-person train ride through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing the cyberpunk metropolis from the NCART metro system. The journey transitions from urban canyons to elevated skyline views, station arrival, and interior passenger scenes.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train passing through dense urban canyon

events.description: beginning of train journey from passenger seat view

agents.ego_description: seated passenger looking out the window at close-proximity buildings passing by

notable_agents.action: passenger with braided hair sitting adjacent to the window

entered.detail: metal and glass window frame of the NCART train car
tall building with illuminated windows passing closely by the train
glowing corporate signage on building facade

segments.scene_description: The journey begins inside the NCART train, looking out at the dense urban canyon of Night City. A passenger with braided hair sits nearby as futuristic skyscrapers with neon signage pass by the window in close proximity.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train view of downtown skyline

events.description: train emerges from urban canyon into open view of city skyline
passing large digital billboards and neon advertisements on skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: passenger observing the sprawling cyberpunk cityscape and towering skyscrapers from the elevated track

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on building exterior
dense grouping of futuristic high-rise buildings with lit windows
glowing corporate brand signage on building facade

segments.scene_description: The train emerges onto an elevated section, revealing a panoramic view of Night City's skyline. Dense clusters of skyscrapers with illuminated windows and large digital billboards dominate the view as the train moves forward.

events.description: train arrives at Alexander Street station platform
train comes to a complete stop at the station

agents.ego_description: passenger waiting as the train arrives and stops at the station platform

notable_agents.action: person standing on platform near the transit map display

entered.detail: large illuminated yellow signage with station name
station identifier sign with white text
illuminated display showing the metro system routes
metal barrier separating platform from train tracks

segments.scene_description: The train arrives at Alexander Street station, slowing to a stop. The platform comes into view with a passenger waiting near the illuminated transit map. The station signage for 'Night City Area Rapid Transit' is prominently displayed.

scene_state.functional_zone: NCART train car interior with passengers

events.description: camera pans to show interior of train car and other passengers
passenger in foreground activates glowing phone screen

agents.ego_description: passenger looking around the train car interior at seated and standing passengers

notable_agents.action: seated passenger with braided hair checking a glowing phone
standing passenger holding onto overhead handrail

entered.detail: rows of upholstered seats with passengers sitting
overhead poles and rails for standing passengers
glass doors with green metal frames
fluorescent tube lights running along the train ceiling

segments.scene_description: The view shifts to the train interior, showing passengers seated and standing. A passenger with braided hair checks their phone while another stands holding the overhead rails. The train begins to depart the station.

events.description: camera returns to window view as train departs station
train accelerates past industrial scaffolding and construction

agents.ego_description: passenger looking out at passing industrial buildings as the train leaves the station area

entered.detail: exterior construction framework on industrial building
bright orange construction safety barrier on building exterior
large digital advertisement showing cybernetic hand imagery

segments.scene_description: The train accelerates away from the station, passing industrial buildings with scaffolding and construction barriers. The view shows the gritty urban infrastructure of Night City as the journey continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the claustrophobic urban canyons of Night City to an expansive skyline view before descending back into the gritty industrial outskirts. It begins inside an NCART train, gliding past neon-lit skyscrapers and a passenger with braided hair, before the perspective opens up as the train emerges onto an elevated track to reveal a panoramic vista of illuminated billboards and towering skyscrapers. The scene then shifts as the train slows to a stop at Alexander Street station, bringing the illuminated transit maps and platform signage into clear view. As the camera turns inward to observe passengers checking phones and holding overhead rails, the train begins to depart, finally accelerating away from the station and passing through a landscape of scaffolding and industrial construction barriers.
